metadata.name: cs_skin_futures
metadata.description: CS2 skin perpetual futures protocol on Solana

instructions.name: add_liquidity
docs: Deposit USDC into the pool and receive LP tokens proportional to
the current pool share.  Resets the 24-hour withdrawal cooldown.

accounts.name: lp_position
docs: Per-user LP position — created on first deposit.
Seeds: [b"lp_position", owner]

accounts.name: liquidity_pool
docs: Global pool state.
Seeds: [b"liquidity_pool"]

accounts.name: user_usdc_account
docs: Owner's USDC ATA — source of deposited liquidity.

accounts.name: vault_token
docs: Protocol USDC SPL vault (initialized once by initialize_vault).
Seeds: [b"vault", usdc_mint]

accounts.name: vault_data
docs: Protocol liquidity data account.
Seeds: [b"vault"]

accounts.name: authority
docs: Keeper bot or protocol authority.

accounts.name: market
docs: Seeds: [b"market", market.price_feed]

accounts.name: position
docs: The position receiving the funding adjustment.
Seeds: [b"position", position.owner, market]

accounts.name: owner_account
docs: Owner's account; debited when funding is owed.
Seeds: [b"user_account", position.owner]

instructions.name: close_position
docs: Close at the live oracle price.  Reverts if PriceFeed is stale (> 2 min).

accounts.name: user_account
docs: Seeds: [b"user_account", owner]

accounts.name: market
docs: Seeds: [b"market", market.price_feed]

accounts.name: position
docs: The position to close. Rent returned to owner at end of instruction.
Seeds: [b"position", owner, market]

accounts.name: price_feed
docs: Protocol PriceFeed — must match `market.price_feed`.

accounts.name: liquidity_pool
docs: Global liquidity pool — updated as counterparty to this trade.
Seeds: [b"liquidity_pool"]

accounts.name: user_account
docs: Created on first deposit via `init_if_needed`.
Seeds: [b"user_account", owner]

accounts.name: user_usdc_account
docs: Depositor's USDC associated token account.

accounts.name: vault_token
docs: Protocol USDC SPL vault (initialized once by initialize_vault).
Seeds: [b"vault", usdc_mint]

accounts.name: vault_data
docs: Protocol liquidity data account.
Seeds: [b"vault"]

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority; payer for market account rent.

accounts.name: market
docs: Market PDA — one per skin, seeded by price_feed pubkey.
Seeds: [b"market", price_feed]

instructions.name: initialize_pool
docs: One-time setup: create the global LiquidityPool account.
Must be called before any add_liquidity deposits.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority — pays rent and becomes pool.authority.

accounts.name: liquidity_pool
docs: Global pool state — one per protocol.
Seeds: [b"liquidity_pool"]

instructions.name: initialize_price_feed
docs: One-time setup: create the on-chain PriceFeed account for an index.
Must be called before `initialize_market` for the same index.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Protocol admin — pays rent, becomes feed authority.

accounts.name: price_feed
docs: PDA seeds: [b"price_feed", skin_id.as_bytes()]
One feed per index (awp-index, ak47-index, knife-index, glove-index).

instructions.name: initialize_vault
docs: One-time setup: create the vault data + SPL token accounts.
Must be called before deposit, open_position, or add_liquidity.

instructions.name: initialize_vault_token
docs: Add a vault token account for an additional USDC mint (e.g. devnet test mint).
vault_data must already exist; only the token account is created.

instructions.name: liquidate
docs: Liquidate an underwater position using the live PriceFeed price.

accounts.name: liquidator
docs: Anyone can call liquidate — open to all.

accounts.name: liquidator_usdc_account
docs: Liquidator's USDC ATA — receives the 5% bonus (created if absent).

accounts.name: owner_account
docs: Position owner's account — position removed from registry.
Seeds: [b"user_account", position.owner]

accounts.name: market
docs: Seeds: [b"market", market.price_feed]

accounts.name: position
docs: Underwater position to liquidate.
Rent returned to liquidator when account closes.
Seeds: [b"position", position.owner, market]

accounts.name: vault_token
docs: Protocol USDC SPL vault — source of liquidation bonus.
Seeds: [b"vault", usdc_mint]

accounts.name: vault_data
docs: Protocol liquidity data account.
Seeds: [b"vault"]

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA — signs vault → liquidator transfer.

accounts.name: price_feed
docs: Protocol PriceFeed — must match `market.price_feed`.

accounts.name: liquidity_pool
docs: Global liquidity pool — absorbs the liquidated collateral (minus bonus).
Seeds: [b"liquidity_pool"]

accounts.name: user_account
docs: User must have deposited first — account is required to exist.
Seeds: [b"user_account", owner]

accounts.name: market
docs: Seeds: [b"market", market.price_feed]

accounts.name: position
docs: New position PDA — one per (owner, market) pair.
Seeds: [b"position", owner, market]

accounts.name: price_feed
docs: Protocol PriceFeed for this market.

accounts.name: liquidity_pool
docs: Global liquidity pool — credited with the taker fee.
Seeds: [b"liquidity_pool"]

instructions.name: push_price
docs: Push a fresh VWAP price from the oracle service.  Only the registered
authority keypair can call this.  `published_at` is set by the
on-chain clock — callers cannot forge freshness.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must match `price_feed.authority`.  No rent charged — authority is
the fee-payer of the transaction and account is already initialised.

accounts.name: price_feed
docs: The feed to update.  Constraint ensures only the registered authority
can write prices — any other signer is rejected.

instructions.name: remove_liquidity
docs: Burn LP tokens and withdraw proportional USDC.
Enforces a 24-hour cooldown after the most recent deposit.

accounts.name: owner
docs: LP owner — must be the original depositor.

accounts.name: lp_position
docs: LP position being redeemed.
Seeds: [b"lp_position", owner]

accounts.name: liquidity_pool
docs: Global pool state.
Seeds: [b"liquidity_pool"]

accounts.name: user_usdc_account
docs: Owner's USDC ATA — receives the withdrawn USDC (created if absent).

accounts.name: vault_token
docs: Protocol USDC SPL vault — source of the withdrawal.
Seeds: [b"vault", usdc_mint]

accounts.name: vault_data
docs: Protocol liquidity data account.
Seeds: [b"vault"]

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault signing authority — signs the vault → owner transfer.

instructions.name: set_market_authority
docs: Transfer the authority on a Market to a new keypair.
Must be signed by the current authority.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Current market authority — must sign to transfer ownership.

accounts.name: market
docs: The market whose authority is being transferred.

instructions.name: set_price_feed_authority
docs: Transfer the push authority on a PriceFeed to a new keypair.
Must be signed by the current authority.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Current feed authority — must sign to transfer ownership.

accounts.name: price_feed
docs: The feed whose authority is being transferred.

instructions.name: update_funding_rate
docs: Permissionless crank — anyone can call once per hour.

accounts.name: market
docs: Permissionless — any caller can crank this.

instructions.name: update_oracle
docs: Push mark + index price manually; recomputes the funding rate.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Must match `market.authority`.

accounts.name: market
docs: Seeds: [b"market", market.price_feed]

accounts.name: user_account
docs: Seeds: [b"user_account", owner]

accounts.name: user_usdc_account
docs: Destination: owner's USDC ATA (created if absent).

accounts.name: vault_token
docs: Protocol USDC SPL vault (token account).
Seeds: [b"vault", usdc_mint]

accounts.name: vault_data
docs: Protocol liquidity data account.
Seeds: [b"vault"]

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA; signs the vault → user transfer.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the market authority

errors.name: InvalidPrice
errors.msg: Price must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidCollateral
errors.msg: Collateral amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: NonceMismatch
errors.msg: Nonce does not match user_account.position_count — re-fetch and retry

errors.name: PositionNotLiquidatable
errors.msg: Position is healthy and cannot be liquidated

errors.name: PositionOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Position owner does not match the provided user_account

errors.name: FundingNotDue
errors.msg: Funding interval has not elapsed yet

errors.name: FundingTooEarly
errors.msg: Funding rate update interval (1 hour) has not elapsed yet

errors.name: StalePriceFeed
errors.msg: Price feed data is older than 2 minutes — push a fresh price

errors.name: LpCooldownActive
errors.msg: LP withdrawal cooldown (24 h) has not elapsed — wait before removing liquidity

errors.name: InsufficientPoolLiquidity
errors.msg: Pool has insufficient liquidity to cover this withdrawal

errors.name: InsufficientLpTokens
errors.msg: Insufficient LP tokens — cannot withdraw more than you own

fields.name: mark_price
docs: Current oracle mark price (6 decimals, USDC).

fields.name: skin_id
docs: Human-readable skin name (e.g. "AK-47 | Redline (Field-Tested)").

fields.name: price_feed
docs: Off-chain price oracle pubkey; used as the PDA seed for this market.

types.name: LiquidityPool
docs: Global liquidity pool — the protocol's counterparty for all trades.
LPs deposit USDC and receive internal LP tokens.  The pool earns trading
fees and absorbs the counterparty risk on every perpetual position.
PDA seeds: `[b"liquidity_pool"]`

fields.name: authority
docs: Admin who initialized the pool.

fields.name: total_usdc
docs: Current USDC owned by the pool (6 decimals).
Increases when LPs deposit or traders lose/pay fees.
Decreases when LPs withdraw or traders profit.

fields.name: lp_supply
docs: Total outstanding LP tokens (internal accounting units).
First deposit sets ratio to 1:1 (USDC → LP token).

fields.name: fees_earned
docs: Cumulative trading fees credited to the pool (6 decimals).
Informational — used for APY display.

fields.name: trader_pnl_paid
docs: Net PnL paid by the pool to traders (6 decimals, signed).
Positive = pool has paid out profits; negative = pool has profited.

fields.name: inception_ts
docs: Unix timestamp of pool initialization — used to annualize APY.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA canonical bump.

types.name: LpPosition
docs: Per-user LP position tracking token balance and cooldown.
LP tokens represent a proportional share of `LiquidityPool.total_usdc`.
A 24-hour cooldown after the last deposit prevents LP front-running.
PDA seeds: `[b"lp_position", owner]`

types.name: Market
docs: On-chain state for a single CS skin perpetuals market.
PDA seeds: `[b"market", price_feed]`

fields.name: authority
docs: Protocol authority that can update oracle prices.

fields.name: skin_id
docs: Human-readable CS skin name (e.g. "AK-47 | Redline (Field-Tested)").

fields.name: price_feed
docs: Off-chain price oracle pubkey; also used as the PDA seed.

fields.name: total_long_open_interest
docs: Total notional of open long positions (6 decimals, USDC).

fields.name: total_short_open_interest
docs: Total notional of open short positions (6 decimals, USDC).

fields.name: funding_rate
docs: Current hourly funding rate (8 decimal places, signed).
Positive → longs pay shorts. Negative → shorts pay longs.
Updated each hour by `update_funding_rate`.

fields.name: cumulative_funding
docs: Global funding accumulator (8 decimal places, signed i128).
Incremented by `funding_rate` every hour.
Positions snapshot this at open; `funding_owed` at close =
(current − entry) × notional / FUNDING_RATE_SCALE.

fields.name: last_funding_rate_update
docs: Unix timestamp of the last `update_funding_rate` call.
Used to enforce the 1-hour crank interval.

fields.name: last_funding_time
docs: Unix timestamp of the last `apply_funding` keeper call (8-hour crank).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA canonical bump.

types.name: Position
docs: On-chain state for a single open perpetual position.
Created by `open_position`, closed by `close_position` or `liquidate`.
One position per (owner, market) pair — no nonce.
PDA seeds: `[b"position", owner, market]`

fields.name: owner
docs: Wallet that opened the position.

fields.name: market
docs: The `Market` account this position belongs to.

fields.name: is_long
docs: `true` = long, `false` = short.

fields.name: collateral
docs: USDC collateral posted as margin (6 decimals).

fields.name: size
docs: Position size in base units (6 decimal places).

fields.name: notional
docs: Notional value at open (collateral × leverage). Stored for exact OI accounting.

fields.name: entry_price
docs: Average entry price (6 decimal places, USDC).

fields.name: liquidation_price
docs: Price at which the position is auto-liquidated (6 decimals, USDC).

fields.name: opened_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the position was opened.

fields.name: entry_funding_index
docs: Snapshot of `market.cumulative_funding` at position open.
Used at close to compute accrued funding:
funding_owed = (market.cumulative_funding − entry_funding_index)
× notional / FUNDING_RATE_SCALE
Positive owed = position pays; negative = position receives.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA canonical bump.

types.name: PriceFeed
docs: Trusted on-chain price feed written exclusively by the protocol admin.
PDA seeds: `[b"price_feed", skin_id.as_bytes()]`
The off-chain pusher (`/scripts/push-prices.ts`) fetches prices from the
oracle service and calls `push_price` every ~60 seconds.  On-chain
instructions call `oracle::get_price`, which rejects prices older than
`MAX_PRICE_AGE` (120 s) with `FuturesError::StalePriceFeed`.

fields.name: authority
docs: Keypair authorised to call `push_price` for this feed.

fields.name: price
docs: Latest pushed price in 6-decimal USDC representation.
$1.00 → 1_000_000.  Zero until the first push.

fields.name: published_at
docs: Unix timestamp (seconds) of the last successful `push_price` call.
Set by the on-chain clock — not supplied by the caller.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA canonical bump.

fields.name: price
docs: Current index price from the oracle service (6 decimals, USDC).

fields.name: mark_price
docs: Current mark price (6 decimals, USDC).

fields.name: index_price
docs: External index price from oracle (6 decimals, USDC).

types.name: UserAccount
docs: Per-user protocol account.
Tracks the USDC balance deposited and all open position PDAs.
PDA seeds: `[b"user_account", owner]`

fields.name: owner
docs: Wallet that owns this account.

fields.name: usdc_balance
docs: USDC available for new positions and withdrawals (6 decimals).

fields.name: positions
docs: Pubkeys of all open `Position` PDAs owned by this wallet.
Maximum 20 concurrent positions.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA canonical bump.

types.name: Vault
docs: Protocol liquidity tracker.
Mirrors the SPL token vault balance so instructions can read total
protocol liquidity without fetching the token account.
PDA seeds: `[b"vault"]`

fields.name: total_liquidity
docs: Total USDC deposited across all users (6 decimals).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA canonical bump.
